title: Veteran Employment Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Veteran Employment Programs 11 Matching Service Providers CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS OUTREACH OUTREACH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Walk-in center providing referrals, food, clothing, DME, camping basic needs, and water for anyone experiencing homelessness or extremely low-income. Conducts outreach to veterans and non-veterans living in homeless camps by providing potable water, food, clothing, phone/fax services,gas vouchers (once per year), ordering DD214 documents for veterans, and facilitating connection to veterans services. 61510 S Highway 97 Suite 100 Bend, OR 977023706 Eligibility: Veterans who are homeless or at imminent risk of homelessness, who need to be screened for eligibility for programs and connection to services for housing, medical, employment and more. Street Outreach services are available for veteran and non-veteran homeless and low-income individuals and households. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3:45pm Email (541) 383-2793 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY CLACKAMAS COUNTY VETERANS EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment services to veterans and education to employers on the benefits of hiring veterans. Serves as a vehicle for connecting employers to skilled veterans. 821 Main Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Veterans who have served in a war, or have recently separated from service, have service-connected disabilities, or have significant barriers to employment. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 650-4678 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERSEALS OREGON EASTERSEALS OREGON BEND WORK SOURCE HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists veterans in reintegrating into the community and finding employment. A structured, individually designed case management plan may include skill sets such as financial literacy, computer training, job search training, and interview guidance. Veterans learn skills to retain employment and become financially independent. 1007 SW Emkay Drive Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Must be homeless or at risk of homelessness (lacking a permanent address), or have been homeless within the last 20 days. Must have at least one day of active duty, must have any discharge other than a dishonorable discharge. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 441-0896 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERSEALS OREGON EASTERSEALS OREGON HOMELESS VETERAN'S REINTEGRATION PROGRAM EUGENE HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists veterans in reintegrating into the community and finding employment. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 414-3680 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF LANE AND SOUTH COAST COUNTIES GOODWILL WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT VETERAN CONNECTIONS HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment-related services to reintegrate homeless veterans into the labor force. Services include job search training and placement, employment readiness training, career exploration, and vocational/technical training. Also provides information about community resources, including housing, transportation, identification, clothing, computer access, and more. 855 Seneca Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: -Must be homeless or at risk of becoming homeless, or have been homeless within 60 days prior to enrollment -Must have served at least one day of active military service and have been discharged under any status other than dishonorable Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 431-3339 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VA PORTLAND COMMUNITY RESOURCE AND REFERRAL CENTER VA COMMUNITY RESOURCE AND REFERRAL CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help to veterans in accessing VA and community services. Services may include short-term case management, onsite primary care, access to medical, mental health, and substance abuse treatment, and access to VA housing programs, including Grant and Per Diem program, HUD/VASH, Veterans Recovery House and Supportive Service for Veteran Families (SSVF) if found eligible. These grants do not provide immediate assistance, are sometimes one-time, and may include case management. Help with finding market rate or subsidized housing or linkage to community housing programs. Assistance with expediting VA Benefit claims and access to employment programs such as Supported Employment, Veterans Reintegration program, and State employment. Access to computers, clothing, and hygiene items is available onsite. 308 SW 1st Avenue Suite 155 Portland, OR 972043432 Eligibility: Veterans and their families who are experiencing homelessness or at risk of becoming homeless. Veterans must be present in the household and must be the one to request services. Some services available for Veterans who are not eligible for full VA Healthcare benefits. Hours: -Business hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 7:30am-4:30pm, Thursday 10am-4:30pm, closed federal holidays -Walk-in hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-3pm, Thursday 10am-3pm. No walk-ins after 2:30pm, better to go earlier in the day. Closed federal holidays. (503) 808-1256 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WORKSOURCE OREGON PRIORITY SERVICE FOR VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Veteran services include job search assistance, workshops, resume writing support, labor market information, career counseling, and a variety of other helpful resources. Offers veterans priority referrals to jobs and access to employment and training services ahead of equally qualified non-veteran applicants. Locator Salem, OR 97311 Eligibility: -US Armed Forces veterans, including service-connected disabled veterans, recently separated veterans (within 36 months), other eligible veterans who have barriers to employment, and eligible spouses -Veterans with a dishonorable discharge are not eligible Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm (503) 947-1394 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS OUTREACH OUTREACH CENTER EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY CLACKAMAS COUNTY VETERANS EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM EASTERSEALS OREGON HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM EASTERSEALS OREGON HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM EASTERSEALS OREGON HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM EASTERSEALS OREGON HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM EASTERSEALS OREGON HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM EASTERSEALS OREGON HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF LANE AND SOUTH COAST COUNTIES VETERAN CONNECTIONS HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM VA PORTLAND COMMUNITY RESOURCE AND REFERRAL CENTER VA COMMUNITY RESOURCE AND REFERRAL CENTER WORKSOURCE OREGON PRIORITY SERVICE FOR VETERANS
